welcome.body: Namaste {{name}}! 🙏 BaseKey aur SuperKey ke official bot mein aapka swagat hai. Main aapki kaise madad kar sakta hoon?

explore_basekey.body: BaseKey ek Advanced WhatsApp Business Platform hai jahan se aap bulk messages, chatbots aur automation set kar sakte hain. Kya dekhna chahenge?

bk_features.body:
BaseKey Features:
1. Interactive Buttons
2. Shared Team Inbox
3. CRM Integration
4. Automated Flow Builder.

bk_pricing.body:
Humare plans aapke business ke hisaab se hain:
- Startup: Free (Trial)
- Professional: ₹999/mo
- Enterprise: Custom Solution.

about_superkey.body: SuperKey ek registered business hai jo Bihar ke Samastipur se chalti hai. Hum tech-solutions aur government tenders (CPPP) par kaam karte hain.

sk_services.body:
SuperKey Services:
1. Web Development
2. Startup Hosting
3. IT Consulting
4. Gov Tender Bidding.

sk_registration.body: SuperKey 'SuperKey' naam se registered hai aur humare paas Udyam Registration aur CPPP enrollment bhi hai.

other_tools.body:
Hamare doosre projects:
1. LockerKey: Password Manager
2. APK Builder
3. 3D Animation Tools.

tool_lockerkey.body: LockerKey aapke passwords ko secure rakhta hai. Ye ek Android App hai jo offline aur online dono kaam karti hai.

main_menu.body: Wapas Main Menu par aa gaye hain. Aage kya karna hai {{name}}?
